policy.refit_hyperparameter_rule: modal outer-fold selected configuration with lexical tie resolution

thresholds.mcc: maximize Matthews correlation coefficient on inner or out-of-fold validation predictions
thresholds.f1: maximize F1 on inner or out-of-fold validation predictions
thresholds.balanced_accuracy: maximize balanced accuracy on inner or out-of-fold validation predictions
thresholds.youden_j: maximize sensitivity plus specificity minus one on inner or out-of-fold validation predictions

interpolation_champion.reason: Highest eligible roc_auc within tolerance 0.01; tie-breakers applied in declared order: higher_pr_auc, lower_uncertainty, simpler_model, fewer_features. Refit hyperparameters use: modal outer-fold selected configuration with lexical tie resolution.

paired_comparisons.caveat: Exploratory paired test over identical outer folds; multiplicity is not adjusted.
